content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges [(4, 6, 3), (0, 2, 5), (0, 8, 8), (1, 3, 9), (6, 9, 11), (4, 8, 12), (3, 8, 14), (3, 7, 19), (3, 5, 20), (3, 6, 20), (0, 5, 22), (1, 8, 22), (0, 7, 23), (1, 9, 24), (6, 7, 24), (2, 7, 29)], we need to find the nodes linked with node 9 exactly at time 11.

After scanning all edges, we have the following matches:

* Edge (0, 2, 5) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (3, 8, 14) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 7, 19) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 5, 22) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 8, 22) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 7, 23) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 9, 24) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 7, 24) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 7, 29) has node 9 and time 11. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched are 2, 8, 7, 5, 8, 7, 9, and 29.

Answer: [2, 8, 7, 5, 8, 7, 9, 29]
